title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at CGI India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at CGI India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About CGI India:
CGI India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CGI India!
